skills.name: Stance Shift
skills.description: Change your stance from [Speed] to [Range], and from [Range] to [Speed]. The skill type of Shenji also changes along with the stance.

skills.name: Spear of the Brave Tiger
skills.description: Spear of the Brave Tiger: Speed
skills.effect_text:
Spear of the Brave Tiger - Speed Skill Factor CaptionRatio % x 3
Spear of the Brave Tiger - Speed [Bleeding] Duration: 5 seconds
Spear of the Brave Tiger - Range Skill Factor CaptionRatio2 % x 2

skills.name: Advancing Spear
skills.effect_text:
Advancing Spear - Speed Skill Factor CaptionRatio %
Advancing Spear - Speed [Slow] lasts for 4 seconds
Advancing Spear - Range Skill Factor CaptionRatio2 %

skills.name: Light as a Feather
skills.description: Light as a Feather, move to the front in a fast speed.

skills.name: Fall of the Ascending Dragon
skills.description: Fall of the Ascending Dragon - Speed
skills.effect_text:
Fall of the Ascending Dragon - Speed Skill Factor CaptionRatio %
Fall of the Ascending Dragon - Range Skill Factor CaptionRatio2 %
Maximum channeling duration of Fall of the Ascending Dragon - Range: 3 seconds

skills.name: Painting with a Spear
skills.description: Continuously attack the enemy by linking the movements of piercing and slashing like dancing.
skills.effect_text:
Painting with a Spear - Speed Skill Factor CaptionRatio %
Painting with a Spear - Range Skill Factor CaptionRatio2 %

skills.name: Incarnation
skills.description: Bring the power of the two sacred beasts upon yourself to enhance your power.
skills.effect_text:
Cooldown decreases by CaptionRatio %
Minimum Critical Rate increases by CaptionRatio2 %
Duration of Minimum Critical Rate effect: CaptionTime second(s)

attributes.name: Spear of the Brave Tiger: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Advancing Spear: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Fall of the Ascending Dragon: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Painting with a Spear: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Spear of the Brave Tiger - Speed: Focus
attributes.description: * [Spear of the Brave Tiger - Speed]'s Bleeding effect is removed and Final Damage increases by 20%

attributes.name: Spear of the Brave Tiger - Range: Maintain
attributes.description: * [Spear of the Brave Tiger - Range]'s effect decreases by 60% but an equal amount of damage is dealt additionally, divided into 10 seconds

attributes.name: Advancing Spear - Range: Continuous Attack
attributes.description:
* The damage dealt per [Advancing Spear - Range] hit decreases by 80% but changes to 6 consecutive hits

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Painting with a Spear: Seal
attributes.description:
* [Silence] is applied to the targets of [Painting with a Spear - Speed] and [Painting with a Spear - Range] for 2.5 seconds

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Painting with a Spear: Control
attributes.description:
* [Painting with a Spear - Speed] and [Painting with a Spear - Range] can be canceled midway of casting

* The cooldown decreases in proportion to the amount of casting time left after it is canceled

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Light as a Feather: Fleet
attributes.description:
* Lifted from [Slow], [Immobility], [Arrest] effect when [Light as a Feather] is cast

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Light as a Feather: Through
attributes.description:
* Penetrates the obstacles in your way when [Light as a Feather] is cast

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Stance Shift: Fierce Dragon
attributes.description:
* Remove all removable debuffs and become immune for 2 seconds when [Stance Shift] is cast

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

* Increases Cooldown by 7 seconds

* The cooldown of this effect is 35 seconds

attributes.name: [Arts] Spear of the Brave Tiger: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: Increases the Skill Factor of [Spear of the Brave Tiger - Speed], [Spear of the Brave Tiger - Range] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Advancing Spear: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: Increases the Skill Factor of [Advancing Spear - Speed], [Advancing Spear - Range] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Fall of the Ascending Dragon: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: Increases the Skill Factor of [Fall of the Ascending Dragon - Speed], [Fall of the Ascending Dragon - Range] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Painting with a Spear: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: Increases the Skill Factor of [Painting with a Spear - Speed], [Painting with a Spear - Range] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Fall of the Ascending Dragon: Whirl Dance
attributes.description:
* Target is knocked back when attacking a normal target with the [Fall of the Ascending Dragon] skill

* Apply a debuff that increases damage received by 10% for 7 seconds on the target when attacking a Boss with the [Fall of the Ascending Dragon] skill

* [Fall of the Ascending Dragon - Range] changes to an instant cast skill and deals damage equal to the originally 2 seconds cast damage at once

attributes.name: [Arts] Incarnation: Second Coming
attributes.description:
* The effect of [Incarnation] is halved

* The other half of the [Incarnation] effect is applied to the party members nearby

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Light as a Feather: Muster
attributes.description:
* Overheat of [Light as a Feather] increases by 1

* Cooldown increases by 10 seconds
